description: A vivid, highly stylized landscape in warm tones of red, orange, gold, and deep brown. A large triangular red tree-like form dominates the center, set against a golden-yellow ground. Dark serpentine or crescent shapes curve around the base. Jagged red mountain-like forms line the upper left. The entire composition is richly patterned with dots, swirls, and organic textures against a dark border.
